arts.ttl: “We must overcome our limits”: Kosta Runjaic prepares Udinese for Fiorentina challenge
arts.sum: Udinese manager Kosta Runjaic shared his thoughts ahead of the team's upcoming match against Fiorentina, emphasizing the need for improvement and overcoming limitations. He acknowledged the quality of Fiorentina, particularly praising their attacking prowess and high-pressing style. Runjaic noted that Fiorentina's current league position is well-deserved, setting the stage for a difficult encounter. The post “We must overcome our limits”: Kosta Runjaic prepares Udinese for Fiorentina challenge appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Udinese: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Artemio Franchi is set to host an enticing Serie A encounter on Monday evening as fourth-placed Fiorentina welcome ninth-placed Udinese. The match presents an opportunity for both sides to end the year on a high note, albeit with contrasting recent fortunes. The post Serie A | Fiorentina v Udinese: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.
